summary: docs: add module-level CLAUDE.md files, Mermaid architecture diagram, and project context
decisions: Restructured root CLAUDE.md to use Mermaid dependency graph instead of plain text tree for better visual navigation
Created per-module CLAUDE.md (11 modules) to provide localized AI context at each package level
Adopted .context/ directory structure for tracking coding preferences, workflow rules, and commit decision history
Added .claude/index.json scan metadata and session-sticky planning documents
